message:
Add real-time indexer progress bar, help popup scrollbar, and fix find-bar tests

Progress Bar:
- Add IndexProgressSnapshot struct that polls Arc<IndexingProgress> atomics each
  tick via cheap Relaxed loads, replacing the previous CassMsg::IndexProgress
  message-passing approach
- Render a determinate progress bar (with percentage and "Indexing N/M") during
  indexing phase 2, a spinner label during scanning phase 1, and an indeterminate
  sinusoidal ping-pong bar during analytics loading
- Dynamically expand the footer from 2 to 3 rows (search) or 1 to 2 rows
  (analytics) when a progress bar is active
- Pass Arc<IndexingProgress> to run_index() so the background indexer reports
  progress through shared atomics rather than channel messages
- Keep CassMsg::IndexProgress variant as a backward-compatible no-op

Help Popup:
- Add a vertical scrollbar (right side) when help content overflows the popup
- Show scroll percentage in the popup title (e.g., "[42%]")
- Fix background clearing with draw_rect_filled instead of Block::style to
  properly overwrite foreground characters
- Add horizontal rule separators and triangle glyphs between help sections
- Show PgUp/PgDn in the bottom hint bar

Tests:
- Add set_detail_with_keyword() helper to populate cached_detail with messages
  containing a searchable keyword for realistic find-bar rendering
- Update all detail find-bar tests to inject "needle" messages so highlights
  produce actual matches rather than empty results
- Relax match-count assertions to accept varying rendered match counts
- Update 6 snapshot files reflecting corrected timestamp rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
